datasets.name: nih_terminations
datasets.purpose: Primary dataset: NIH grant terminations snapshot from Grant Witness (5,419 records, 57 columns)

datasets.name: harvard_reports
datasets.purpose: Context: Harvard Gazette reports on NIH funding disputes

note: Supplementary API-based datasets (OpenAlex, NIH RePORTER, etc.) not bulk-downloaded at Stage 0; will be queried as needed in Stage 4.
